name: chr1_1p13_2_NBPF_cassettes
description: 1p13.2 region containing pericentric NBPF paralogs (notably NBPF4/5/6) interleaved with unique single-copy genes (NRAS, AMPD1). Part of the genome-wide NBPF Olduvai-domain expansion that is human-lineage-specific.

architecture.internal_structure: NBPF paralog blocks of 30-60 kb at 97-99% identity dispersed among unique gene loci; Olduvai (DUF1220) tandem domain expansions inside the NBPF copies.
